nasb.text: “Now if a person sins and does any of the things which the Lord has commanded not to be done, though he was unaware, still he is guilty and shall bear his punishment.

esv.text: “If anyone sins, doing any of the things that by the Lord’s commandments ought not to be done, though he did not know it, then realizes his guilt, he shall bear his iniquity.

cnv.text: “如果有人犯了罪，行了一件耶和華吩咐不可行的事；他雖然不清楚，仍是有罪，他就要擔當自己的罪責。

ccb.text: “如果有人触犯耶和华的诫命，即使他不知道，也是有罪的，必须担当罪责。
